description: AI Agents Engineer specializing in LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI and MCP. Building autonomous AI systems, multi-agent orchestration, and intelligent automation workflows for enterprises and startups worldwide. Remote-friendly, available for projects globally.

# Primary Language: English

ai-agents:
